notes: Round 2 review after stress bug fixes. Round 1 admitted_clean. Stress fixes: Temperature 0 falsy bug (handleSave), delete confirmation (confirmDelete signal), null-safety (optional chaining on sync.data?.part and msg.tokens?.cache). Typecheck: packages/app 0 new errors, packages/desktop 1 pre-existing orphaned import. 335/335 tests pass. Prior validation: 0 blocking defects, 2 non-blocking (resolved).

blocker_description: BLOCKING: Commit 069da3d78 has `import { installCli } from "./install-cli"` in packages/desktop/src/main/ipc.ts but no install-cli.ts module exists in the main process directory. This will crash the Electron main process at startup with a module-not-found error. Working tree has already removed this line but the fix is uncommitted.
repair_path: Commit the working tree fix (which removes the broken import and handler from ipc.ts) OR create packages/desktop/src/main/install-cli.ts with the function implementation. Additionally, preload/types.ts exposes `getDesktopPluginConfig?: () => Promise<any>` with no backing IPC handler — either add the handler or remove the preload stub.

blocker_description: 4 blocking falsifiers inside declared boundary: (1) Partial write silent data loss in saveCustomAgents — IPC save fires without await/try-catch, toast fires before write completes, data silently lost on restart. (2) Generic store-set/store-get IPC bypass path causes data corruption — pre-existing generic handlers (lines 83-98) operate on same electron-store with incompatible serialization (string vs array), corrupting typed handler data. (3) Zero runtime validation on IPC persistence boundary — get-desktop-custom-agents returns `as unknown[]` without Array.isArray guard, set handler stores without element shape validation; corrupted or malformed data flows silently to UI. (4) Duplicate AgentDef type defined in TWO files (preload/types.ts + dialog-manage-agents.tsx) with no shared source — divergence risk causes silent data loss. Additionally: production-proof-adversary returned inconclusive (empty report). Pre-existing defect in ipc.ts (broken install-cli import) makes app unstartable — deferred seam.
repair_path: See combined JSON repair directives below for 4 actionable repairs inside the declared boundary.

notes: Round 3 admission. All 4 blocking blockers from Round 2 resolved: (1) saveCustomAgents made async with try/catch + state revert, (2) RESERVED_STORE_NAMES blocklist added to generic store handlers, (3) isValidAgentDef + validateAndFilterAgents added for IPC boundary validation, (4) AgentDef type unified to packages/app/src/types/agent.ts shared source. Typecheck: 0 errors on both packages/app and packages/desktop.
